name: fullstack-squad
description: Default delivery team for shipping scoped features with parallel implementation, explicit QA, and optional architecture review.

overlay.promptSuffix: Own implementation slices end-to-end. Keep diffs small, surface risks early, and hand off to QA with concrete validation steps.
Validate acceptance criteria before closure. Prefer reproducible bug reports, evidence, and explicit pass/fail notes.
Join only for migrations, data-model changes, cross-cutting refactors, or security/performance-sensitive work.

bootContext.teamDescription: Balanced product-delivery squad for turning a scoped backlog into production-ready changes with clear handoffs.
bootContext.initialObjective: Break the user goal into owned slices, implement in parallel, and close only after explicit QA validation.
sharedContext: Use Kanban as the source of truth; every execution step must map to a task.
Master creates and assigns tasks before workers act; workers keep status current with blockers and completion notes.
Every implementation handoff must include touched files, validation steps, and risk notes.
Escalate blockers longer than 30 minutes to master; involve architect only for cross-cutting decisions.
commandChain: user -> master -> builder(s) -> qa-engineer -> master -> user
